headline: Taiwan Semiconductor Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y

headline: Oracle’s Week of Big Gains Masks a Huge Red Flag: Why Conservative Investors Should Look Elsewhere
summary: Oracle (NASDAQ: ORCL) surged 29.4% in a single week, fueled by AI infrastructure announcements and a massive remaining performance obligation backlog. But the weekly pop masks structural risks that should concern conservative investors. The stock sits well below its 52-week high of $345.72 and closed most recently at $178.34. That context matters for retirement-focused investors ... Oracle’s Week of Big Gains Masks a Huge Red Flag: Why Conservative Investors Should Look Elsewhere
